---
title: Seville, cours savoir dessiner urban sketching
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784733592/courssavoirdessiner_vnmfe7.png
description: Seville, cours savoir dessiner urban sketching
categories: [urbansketch]
date: 2023/03/25
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784733592/courssavoirdessiner_vnmfe7.png)

:::
